arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan (Champions League)
arts.sum: A guess at Bayern Munich ’s starting XI, which is a tough ask given all of the injuries. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Inter Milan: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch and more!
arts.sum: For the first time in history, Bayern Munich and Inter Milan will clash in the Champions League quarterfinal stage. Inter finished fourth in the Champions League group stage then defeated Feyenoord twice in the Round of 16.

arts.ttl: Kompany: Total 'faith' in fit Bayern stars vs. Inter
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be missing several key players in Tuesday's Champions League quarterfinal first leg clash at home to Inter Milan, but manager Vincent Kompany has complete faith in those that are available.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany discusses injury crisis and experience ahead of Inter clash
arts.sum: Bayern Munich host Inter in the UEFA Champions League quarter-final first leg at the Allianz Arena on Tuesday night. Speaking in Monday’s press conference, Vincent Kompany discussed the club’s current…

arts.ttl: Lautaro Martinez plea bargain for blasphemy sparks more controversy
arts.sum: Inter captain Lautaro Martinez has officially agreed a plea bargain with the Italian football authorities...

arts.ttl: Kompany and Laimer: ‘Bayern in a difficult situation, but need to believe we can beat Inter’
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany admitted that Bayern Munich are facing a ‘difficult situation’ ahead of their Champions...

arts.ttl: Training Report: Good news, bad news scenario for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Final training before the quarterfinal first leg against Inter – without Manuel Neuer and Kingsley Coman! Bayern Munich winger Kingsley Coman continues to struggle with a foot issue that has hampered him for weeks.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl admits Thomas Müller might fire him if he were to start work at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Despite clamors from the fans, Bayern Munich coldly decided that Thomas Müller’s journey with the club ends this year. The 35-year-old Müller still wants to play, but there’s still no decision of a retirement or a new chapter at a different club.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Inter Milan: Champions League prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h, odds
arts.sum: High-flying Inter head north to Germany as Vincent Kompany wrangles a titanic injury crisis

arts.ttl: Harry Kane desperate to win Champions League as he closes in on first trophy
arts.sum: Harry Kane is posting big numbers in front of goal again and Bayern Munich will be hoping he can continue that as they prepare to face meanest defence in Europe
